creator: trix@basement.net
text:
It seems that the author has changed revision control systems for maintaining sysutils/libchk from CVSweb to ViewVC.  The path in sysutils/libchk/pkg-desc should be updated.

Fix: --- pkg-descr.old       Thu May 31 08:18:31 2007
+++ pkg-descr   Thu May 31 08:19:09 2007
@@ -11,4 +11,4 @@
 libraries that look obsolete.
 
 Author: Akinori MUSHA <knu@FreeBSD.org>
-WWW:   http://www.iDaemons.org/cgi-bin/cvsweb.cgi/libchk/
+WWW:   http://svn.idaemons.org/cgi-bin/viewvc.cgi/trunk/?root=libchk


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Follow the link in sysutils/libchk/pkg-desc to http://www.iDaemons.org/cgi-bin/cvsweb.cgi/libchk/.

Result is "Error: No valid CVS roots found! See @CVSrepositories in the configuration file (/home/www/www.idaemons.org/cgi-bin/cvsweb.conf)."
